description: Style Notenew hide comes up with this item du jour - just right to add a new season twist to your off-duty wardrobe. Style this belt with tonal shoes (no sports shoes please!) to get the look just right.Product DetailsBrown canvas belt with a leather tailTang clasp with a single prong buckle, has holes to customise the FitMaterial and careCanvas, leatherWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust
